plays.story: Pathfinder is severing ties with Archives of Nethys, the fan-run SRD reference site the whole community depends on

angles.bizzal-games: 'Paizo Just Kicked Its Best Rules Reference to the Curb — Here's What GMs Do Now' — a practical guide to bookmarking replacement SRD tools and archiving your prep before links break.
